decisions.title_en: DeepSeek nears $7.4B first-ever funding round at ~$59B valuation, led by Tencent and CATL
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. China's largest-ever startup raise; first external funding after long self-funding; ~6x valuation jump from $10B (April).

decisions.title_en: European Commission proposes Tech Sovereignty Package: Chips Act 2.0 + Cloud and AI Development Act
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Major EU policy: triple datacenter capacity in 5-7 years, prioritize advanced foundry, cloud/AI sovereignty framework.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic adds Services Track tiers + Partner Hub to Claude Partner Network
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. 3-tier certified-services structure (Select/Preferred/Global Premier); 40,000 firms applied, 10,000 certified consultants since March.

decisions.title_en: Coralogix raises $200M Series F at $1.6B to build the monitoring layer for AI agents
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Observability bet on autonomous agents; >$100M ARR, 60% growth, led by Advent + CPPIB.

decisions.title_en: Tempus unveils next-gen Lens, an agentic AI platform for oncology drug development
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. event_date 2026-05-31 is 4 days old (within 5-day limit). Validated AI agents for biomarker validation and trial design.

decisions.title_en: Apoha exits stealth with $36M to build materials-discovery AI from liquid 'wave form' data
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Novel approach (VIBE wave-form embeddings); Boehringer Ingelheim partnership at >90% precision on antibody screening.

decisions.title_en: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash beats 3.1 Pro on coding/agentic benchmarks
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-05-19 (Google I/O) is 16 days old (>5 day limit). Gemini 3.5 Pro GA not yet shipped.

decisions.title_en: xAI launches Grok Build coding agent in early beta
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-05-14 is 21 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: Nvidia brands its N1X laptop SoC as 'RTX Spark' at GTC Taipei
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-06-01 covering the N1X laptop SoC and Vera Rubin. RTX Spark is the consumer brand name for the same N1X chip; no substantive new facts beyond rebranding.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft details MAI-Code-1-Flash and MAI-Thinking-1 at Build
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-06-02 (Suleyman's 7 MAI models incl. MAI-Thinking-1 and MAI-Code-1). No substantive new information.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI Codex now used by 5M+ weekly; Sites and annotations recap
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-06-02 (Codex into ChatGPT, 6 business plugins, Sites, annotations). Weekly-usage figure alone is not a substantive new development.
